zh.lifeSummary: 當Jane Chauntrell於1481年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾諾薩普頓時，她的父親William Chauntrell26歲，母親Elizabeth Mann22歲。她於大約1501年與Sir Edmond Edmund Hazelwood Keeper of Fleet Prison在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾麥德維爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1541年7月在英國倫敦享年60歲，埋葬在英國米德萊可倫敦 聖 布利德也斯 邱奇 福利特 史崔特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jane Chauntrell于1481年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾諾薩普頓时，她的父亲William Chauntrell26岁，母亲Elizabeth Mann22岁。她于大约1501年与Sir Edmond Edmund Hazelwood Keeper of Fleet Prison在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾麥德維爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1541年7月在英国倫敦享年60岁，埋葬在英国米德萊可倫敦 聖 布利德也斯 邱奇 福利特 史崔特。

nameMeanings.name: Chauntrell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Cantrell
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from Old French canterelle, chanterelle, a diminutive of c(h)anteor ‘singer’. Compare Cantor . It was used as an alternative name for Chantecler the cock in medieval French versions of the folk story of Reynard the Fox (Le Roman de Renard).
English: sometimes a variant of   Quintrell  .
English: occasionally, perhaps a habitational name from Cantrell in Devon, early recorded as Canterhulle, named from an unexplained first element + Old English hyll ‘hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Jane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

variants.name: Jayne
meanings: Elaborated spelling of   Jane  , a form popularized no doubt by the American actress  Jayne Mansfield  (  Vera Jayne Palmer ,  1933–67 ) and British ice-dancer  Jayne Torvill  (  b. 1957 ).

variants.name: Jain
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Jane Chauntrell was born in 1481, in Northampton, Northamptonshire, England, her father, William Chauntrell, was 26 and her mother, Elizabeth Mann, was 22. She married Sir Edmond Edmund Hazelwood Keeper of Fleet Prison about 1501, in Maidwell, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 5 daughters. She died in July 1541, in London, England, at the age of 60, and was buried in London St Bride's Church Fleet Street, Middlesex, England.

fr.London St Bride's Church Fleet Street, M: London St Bride's Church Fleet Street, Middlesex, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jane Chauntrell est née en 1481, à Northampton, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, William Chauntrell, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Mann, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Edmond Edmund Hazelwood Keeper of Fleet Prison environ 1501, à Maidwell, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en juillet 1541, à Londres, Angleterre, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterrée à London St Bride's Church Fleet Street, Middlesex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jane Chauntrell 1481 in Northampton, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Chauntrell 26 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Mann 22. Sie hat um 1501 in Maidwell, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom Sir Edmond Edmund Hazelwood Keeper of Fleet Prison geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb im Juli 1541 im Alter von 60 Jahren in London, England und wurde in London St Bride's Church Fleet Street, Middlesex, England begraben.

Lei sposato Sir Edmond Edmund Hazelwood Keeper of Fleet Prison circa 1501, nel Maidwell, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel luglio 1541, nel London, England, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolta a London St Bride's Church Fleet Street, Middlesex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Jane Chauntrellが1481年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアノーサンプトンで生まれた時，父William Chauntrellは26歳，母Elizabeth Mannは22歳であった。約1501年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアメイドウエルでSir Edmond Edmund Hazelwood Keeper of Fleet Prisonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1541年7月にイギリスロンドンで60歳で死去し，イギリスミッドレセックスロンドン スト ブリデ'ス チャーチ フリート ストレエトにて埋葬された。

ko.London St Bride's Church Fleet Street, M: 영국 미들레세스 런던 스트 브라이데'스 c후르치 플릿 스트릿
ko.lifeSummary: Jane Chauntrell(이)가 1481년 영국 노르섬프토실르 노르섬프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Chauntrell(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Mann(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 대략 1501년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 메이드웰에서 Sir Edmond Edmund Hazelwood Keeper of Fleet Prison(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1541년 7월 영국 런던에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 런던 스트 브라이데'스 c후르치 플릿 스트릿에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Sir Edmond Edmund Hazelwood Keeper of Fleet Prison aproximadamente 1501, em Maidwell, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em julho de 1541, em London, Inglaterra, com 60 anos, e foi sepultada em London St Bride's Church Fleet Street, Middlesex, Inglaterra.

ru.London St Bride's Church Fleet Street, M: лондон ст бриде'с чурч флит стрит, миддлесекс, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jane Chauntrell родилась в 1481 г. в местности нортамптон, нортамптоншир, Англия, её отцу по имени William Chauntrell было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Mann, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Edmond Edmund Hazelwood Keeper of Fleet Prison около 1501 г. в местности меидвелл, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла июль 1541 г. в местности Лондон, Англия в возрасте 60 лет и была похоронена в местности лондон ст бриде'с чурч флит стрит, миддлесекс, Англия.
